display_information.name: Margin
display_information.long_description: Margin is a private meeting-memory agent for Slack. Send it a short note during a huddle or scheduled meeting, and it preserves the original text, attaches trustworthy meeting context, organizes the note, and resurfaces it when it becomes useful.

agent_view.agent_description: Capture private meeting notes without recording the meeting. Margin preserves your original words and adds context, organization, reminders, and retrieval.

suggested_prompts.title: Capture a note
suggested_prompts.message: Important: ask whether this affects customer-created workflows.

suggested_prompts.title: Find a note
suggested_prompts.message: What did I note about customer workflows?
